center.name: 關島
center.summary: 關島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Black francolin、Mariana swiftlet、Bridled white-eye，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Douglas|year=1973|journal=Birding|volume=5|pages=195–196|title=Black Francolin|issn=0161-1836|url=http://www.hdouglaspratt.com/journal_articles/Pratt%20'73%20Francolin.pdf|access-date=10 January 2023|via=hdouglasspratt.com}} and Cameron parishes of southwestern Louisiana in 1961. Additional introductions have also occurred in south Florida. Elsewhere, black francolins have been introduced to Guam and the Hawaiian Islands. The birds are found in scrubby habitats with plenty of cultivated crops tall enough to offer shelter and open beneath to provide escape routes and easy travel

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: conspicillatus) | genus = Zosterops | species = conspicillatus | authority = (Kittlitz, 1833) | synonyms = * Dicaeum conspicillatum }} The bridled white-eye (Zosterops conspicillatus) (Chamorro name: nosa) is a species of white-eye native to the Mariana Islands and formerly Guam

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The swiftlet is found in Guam as well as in Saipan and Aguiguan in the Northern Mariana Islands, and is locally extinct on Rota and Tinian
